Text.Page: Our necklaces aren't green because our skin is green, but because our blood is—because green is the color of orcan pride. Tell him that!
Blood? Skin? What's the difference? Our skin is green because our blood is green. Has nothing to do with pretty baubles. Kuban makes no sense. Tell him that.
Hmmph! What do you think, <PCNAME>? Is this necklace a pretty bauble or the symbol of our tribe?<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"I really don't know."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>
